## Validation

- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one problem.
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests or the reason is documented.
- [ ] Plugin hooks still catch normal failures and do not crash OpenCode.
- [ ] Runtime docs or configuration tables were updated if behavior changed.
